title: Platinum Next Time Preview questions
wikitext:
[]: Platinum Next-Time Preview questions             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Oct 11, 2006 6:32 pm 1) Are the Next Time Previews for the Video (& released on LD, or were those the theraical versions?? :?) versions of 25' (Air) and 26' (My Purest Heart for you) [url]http://www.angelfire.com/anime4/mdwigs/Movies.html[/url] included as omake and/or included on any of the Platinum DVDS? (I only have up to Vol.3 so far... ) I've seen a raw 25' preview on a fansub and I've seen a raw 26' preview (both were poor quality), so I'm wondering what the translations were and I think that'd be a cool extra to have. The 25' preview I have more or less of an idea of what's being said, mostly because Misato had esstienally the same speech as on the Addition track (which I wish I could find somewhere, too bad it's OOP! ) but with the 26' preview I'm not really sure. (All I know is Misato says something about Shinji being in a place where there was nothing there (LCL Sea??). IE: soko ni something wa nakatta, soki ni something else wa nakatta. soko ni yet another thing wa nakatta, soki ni...) 2) The 30-sec Next Time previews were only included for the NPC episodes (21'-24'), right? Were they not included in the Japanese DVD release as well? Why couldn't both versions (15-sec and 30-sec) be included for the episodes?! (Lemme guess: Because ADV sucks ass?) ...Yes, I'm very nit-picky when it comes to releases of my favorite anime.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Wed Oct 11, 2006 7:52 pm You have just confused the shit out of me. On the platinum disc, the preview shown at the end of 24' is for 25'.

[]: Re: Platinum Next-Time Preview questions             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Oct 11, 2006 10:18 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: 1) Are the Next Time Previews for the Video (& released on LD, or were those the theraical versions?? :?) versions of 25' (Air) and 26' (My Purest Heart for you) [url]http://www.angelfire.com/anime4/mdwigs/Movies.html[/url] included as omake and/or included on any of the Platinum DVDS?

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Thu Oct 12, 2006 5:38 am Wait, there are previews after the credits on all episodes in the Platinum thinpack. Oh, are you talking about this? The Video Version of Episode 25': Eye catch: "Neon Genesis Evangelion Episode: 25' Love is destructive." Credits for just episode 25 are shown at the end to the song "Thanatos - If I Can't Be Yours - (Short Version)" At the end of the episode there is a preview of the next episode.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 12, 2006 8:40 am You're making me really confused. Kaysow wrote: Wait, there are previews after the credits on all episodes in the Platinum thinpack. Oh, are you talking about this? The Video Version of Episode 25': Eye catch: "Neon Genesis Evangelion Episode: 25' Love is destructive." Credits for just episode 25 are shown at the end to the song "Thanatos - If I Can't Be Yours - (Short Version)" At the end of the episode there is a preview of the next episode.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Oct 12, 2006 8:54 am What is the 'Genesis' version?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 12, 2006 8:58 am cat42 wrote: What is the 'Genesis' version?

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Oct 12, 2006 10:26 am Thank you. Now I finally know that I didn't hallucinate a preview for 26', (I first saw the movies as a fansub, obviously it seems, of the video release).

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Thu Oct 12, 2006 2:14 pm Gotcha Reichu wrote: I was hoping for remastered original previews. There's some rough versions of unfinished scenes in there that were left out of Renewal (it seems), and it became a pain to imitate when Kevin Caldwell used those for 'Engel'.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Oct 12, 2006 6:45 pm Sucks that those weren't included. :( Thanks for pointing that out, Reichu-chan! EDIT: Though interestingly enough, the Platinum transcripts from your site at the end of 24', has the dialouge for the 25' next-time [video version, as there was no Next-Time for the thearter versions] preview. :shock: Hmmm....I guess maybe that was included for Platinum but the 26' Next-Time wasn't?
